items.summary: `packages/codex:getV3CampaignStatus` exceeds Convex document-read limits on hot score-stage V3 cohorts because `collectProcessHealth` scans too many process_request_targets rows.
items.needed_to_answer: What is the cohort state quickly during a live full n=30 score-stage pass?
items.recommended_fix: Add a lighter-weight cohort status path for V3 that avoids full process health scans once score stages become hot, or paginate/aggregate process_request_targets by cohort member.
